reviews.review_description: When I played this game, I was thinking I was going to get myself into a lot, but I get on I found out how fast the game gets boring. All you do in the game is go through the same few rooms over and over again and fight dolls. But the gameplay not just bad the combat is just terrible, you can’t punch the enemy it is really hard to rip them. The only way to rip them is to throw them on a wall. But if this game gets more work put into it, it could be a nice game.￼￼

There is not a lot you can do other than punch or pull apart the plushies.  The enemies go down very quickly.  There is also no progress in the game… you move between the same rooms where you easily defeat the same stuffys over and over.  My kids grew tired of this game in very short order and they were super excited to play it.  Disappointing

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the comment. I agree, as of now, there is not much to the game, as it was a small experiment of mine, hence the low price.
In the future, I am planning a rework to have more content and progress into the game, but this will be far in the future.
In the meantime, I'd love to hear what you or your kids would like to see in the game, so that I can improve!
